qText: A bullet train covers a fixed distance in 30 minutes at an average speed of 360 km/h. Due to track maintenance, it needs to be diverted, increasing the distance by 25%. If the train needs to arrive at its destination on time (i.e., in 30 minutes), what should its new average speed be in km/h ?

A bike starts from City Y at 2:00 PM and travels towards City Z at a speed of 60 km/h. A bus starts from City Z at 3:30 PM and travels towards City Y at a speed of 90 km/h. If the distance between City Y and City Z is 540 km, at what time will they cross each other?

A cyclist rides from town X to town Z, which is 80 km away, at a speed of 20 km/h. After reaching town Z, the cyclist immediately turns back and rides towards town X at a speed of 12 km/h. What is the cyclist's average speed for the entire journey ?
Two train start simultaneously from points A and B , 180 km apart, and meet after 3 hours. If the speed of one train is 35 km/h, what is the speed of the other?

A policeman noticed a thief at some distance. The policeman started running to catch the thief and the thief also started running at the same time. The speed of both the policeman and the thief was 12 km per hour and 10 km per hour, respectively. It took 30 minutes for the policeman to catch the thief. Find the initial distance (in metres) between them.

A thief steals an item and escapes, running at 13.5 km/h. A policeman arrives at the spot of the crime after 8 minutes and immediately starts chasing the thief. 28 minutes after the policeman started to chase the thief, there is still a gap of 540 m between the two. At what distance from the spot of the crime would the policeman catch up with the thief, and what is the speed (in km/h) at which the policeman ran ?

A police station, a bank and a safe house for the thief are in a straight line with a bank in between. The distance between the police station and the safe house is four times the distance between the bank and the safe house. After looting the bank at 9:15 A.M, the thief runs away. A policeman gets the information instantly and chases him at the speed of 16 km/h. The policeman catches the thief at the gate of the safe house in fifteen minutes. What is the distance between the bank and the police station ?

While travelling from A to B, Raghav travels a quarter of the distance at 10 km/h, the next quarter of the distance at 15 km/h, the third quarter of the distance at 20 km/h, and the final quarter of the distance at 30 km/h. While travelling on exactly the same route, Manish travels for a quarter of the total time taken for his journey at 10 km/h, the next quarter of the total time taken for his journey at 15 km/h, the third quarter of the total time taken for his journey at 20 km/h, and the final quarter of the total time taken for his journey at 30 km/h. If the overall average speed of Raghav during his journey is given as y km/h, and that of Manish is given as z km/h, find the value of (z – y).

A man runs for 40 km. The time taken by him in the first 10 km is twice the time taken by him in the second 10 km. The time taken in the third 10 km is half of the time taken in the fourth 10 km, and the time taken in the fourth 10 km is equal to the time taken in the first 10 km. If his speed in the first 10 km is 40 km/h, then what is the average speed for 40 km?
If a person walks at 18 km/hr instead of 12 km/hr, he would have walked 24 km more. What is the actual distance travelled by him?
The distance between two towns is covered in 9 hours at a speed of 60 kmph. By how much should the speed (in km/h) be increased so that 1 hour of the travelling time is saved?
If the ratio among the time taken by three cars to travel a certain distance is 2 : 3 : 5, then the ratio of speeds of these cars will be:

Anil completed a certain journey by a car. If he covered 35% of the distance at 70 km/h. 40% of the distance at 80 km/h and the remaining distance at 50 km/h, his average speed (in km/h) for the entire journey is:
Two men do the same journey by travelling at the speed of 18 km/h and 24 km/h, respectively. If one man takes 20 minutes more than the other man, then the distance (in km) of the total journey is:

A train starts from a station P for another station Q at 6 p.m. at an average speed of 75 km per hour. Another train starts from station Q for station P at 8 p.m. at an average speed of 105 km per hour. If the distance between these two stations is 690 km, then at what time will the two trains meet ?

A boy covers a certain distance between his house and school on a cycle. Riding on an average speed of 15 km/h, he is late by 10 min. However, with an average speed of 20 km/h, he reaches the school 5 min earlier. Find the distance between his house and school.

The force (in pound-force) needed to keep a car from skidding on a curve varies directly with the weight of the car (in pounds) and the square of its speed (in miles per hour [mph]) and inversely with the radius (in feet) of the curve. Suppose 6125 pound- force is required to keep a 2750 pound car, travelling at a speed of 35 mph, from skidding on a curve of radius 550 feet. How much pound-force is then required to keep a 3600 pound car, travelling at a speed of 50 mph, from skidding on a curve of radius 750 feet?

A thief steals an item and escapes, running at a speed of 15 km/h. A policeman arrives at the spot of the crime after 4 minutes and immediately starts chasing the thief. 16 minutes after the policeman started to chase the thief; there is still a gap of 200 m between the two. At what distance from the spot of the crime will the policeman catch up the thief and what is the speed (in km/h) of the policeman ?

Anil and Tirath drove between two points A and B 192 km apart. Anil started the journey from point A at 8 : 20 a.m.; drove at a speed of 64 km/h; reached point B and immediately returned to A at the same speed. Tirath started the journey from point A at 9 : 50 a.m.; drove at a speed of 96 km/h; reached point B and immediately returned to A at the same speed. At what time did Anil and Tirath first meet each other?

Anuj and Anup have to travel from a place A to a place B in their respective cars, Anuj is driving at 70 km/h, and takes 3 halts of 10 minutes each, while Anup is driving at 80 km/h, and takes 4 halts of 15 minutes each. The time taken by Anup to reach Place B, if Anuj takes 8.5 hours, is :

Anand covers a certain distance in the first lag of 5 hours at the speed of 50 km/h. In the second lag, he increased the speed by 20% due to which he covered 20% extra distance than that of the first lag. He covered the third lag at the average speed of the first two lags and covered 10% extra distance than that of the second lag distance.How much total time (in hours) did he take to complete all three lags?
A car starts running at an initial speed of 60km/h, with its speed increasing every hour by 10 km/h. How many hours will it take to cover a distance of 1210 km?

The distance between two places is 1200 km. To cover this distance, a person X takes 5 hours lesser than another person Y, whose average speed is 40 km/h lesser than that of X. The time taken by Y to complete the travel is:
A car left 4 hours later than the scheduled time but in order to reach its destination 480 km away in time, it had to increase its usual speed by 10 km/hr. What is the usual speed of the car ?
Excluding stoppages, the speed of a bus is 60 kmph and including stoppages, it is 54 kmph. For how many minutes does the bus stop per hour?
The speed of a train including stoppages is 75 kmph and excluding stoppages, the speed of the train is 90 kmph. For how many minutes does the train stop per hour?
The radius of a wheel is 14 cm. How much distance will be travelled by the wheel in 10 revolutions?

Two cities A and B are 135 km apart on a straight track. One car starts from A at 8 a.m. and travels towards B at 25 km/h. Another car starts from B at 9 a.m. and travels towards A at a speed of 30 km/h. At what time will they meet?

A bus starts from a bus station after every 30 minutes in the same direction. The speed of each bus is the same. Z is riding a bike in the opposite direction at a speed of 25 km/h . Z meets each bus in 20 minutes. What is the speed of each bus ?

A person goes from P to Q at a speed of 20 km/h.Then he goes from Q to R at a speed of q km/h. Finally the person goes from R to S at a speed of r km/h. The distances from P to Q, Q to R and R to S are equal. If the average speed 280 from P to R is km/h and the 11 112 average speed from Q to S is km/h, 3 then what is the value of r ?

If a boy goes from his home to his school at a speed of 40 km/h, he reaches 10 minutes early. If he goes at a speed of 35 km/h, he reaches 5 minutes late. What will be the time taken for the journey at a speed of 35 km/h?

Three cities, A, B, and C are located such that they form the vertices of an equilateral triangle if joined by straight lines. Rashid travels from A to B at the speed of 40 km/h, from B to C at the speed of 60 km/h and from C to A at the speed of 72 km/h. Find the average speed of Rashid for the entire journey.

A man had to travel 49 km, which he divided into six stretches which were exact multiples of either 4 km or 5 km. The first four stretches were 4 km, 5 km, 8 km, and 10 km. Multiples of 4 km and 5 km were travelled at the rates of 40 and 60 km/h, respectively, and between two consecutive stretches, he rested for six minutes. What was his average speed (in km/h) for the whole journey?
A man walking at a speed of 3km/h crosses a square field diagonally in 5 minutes. What is the area of the field (in m ^2 ) ?

A takes 2 hours more than B to cover a distance of 40 km. If A doubles 1 his speed, he takes 1 hour more than B 2 to cover 80 km. To cover a distance of 120 km, how much time (in hours) will B take travelling at his same speed?

A train leaves station A at 8 am and reaches station B at 12 noon. A car leaves station B at 8:30 am and reaches station A at the same time when the train reaches station B. At what time do they meet?

X and Y start at the same time to ride from place A to place B, which is 80km away from A. X travels 4 km/hour slower than Y.Y reaches place B and at once turns back meeting X, 16 km from place B. Y’s speed(in km/h) is:

Vaibhav and Vignesh each travel a distance of 78 km such that the speed of Vaibhav is faster than that of Vignesh. The sum of their speeds is 91 kmph and the total time taken by both is 3 hours and 30 minutes. The speed (Km/h) of Vaibhav is:

4 Train A takes 1 hours more than 5 the time taken by train B to cover a distance of 360 km. If the speed of train A doubles, it will take 36 min less than the time taken by train B to travel the same distance. What is the speed of train B ? (in kmph)

Two trains start at the same time from two stations and proceed towards each other at speeds of 90 km/h and 70 km /h , respectively. When they meet, it is found that one train has travelled 140 km more than the other. What is the distance between the two stations? (in km)

A person travels a distance of 300km and then returns to the starting point. The time taken by him for the outward journey is 5 hours more than the time taken for the return journey. If he returns at a speed of 10km/h more than the speed of going, what is the average speed (in km/h) for the entire journey ?

A delivery boy started from his office at 10 a.m. to deliver an article. He rode his scooter at a speed of 32 km/h. He delivered the article and waited for 15 minutes to get the payment. After the payment was made, he reached his office at 11 : 25 a.m., travelling at a speed of 24 km/h. Find the total distance travelled by the boy.

The distance between two railway stations is 1176 km. To cover this distance, an express train 5 hours less than a passenger train while the average speed of the passenger train is 70 km/h less than that of the express train. The time taken by the passenger train to complete the travel is:
Two cars start from the same place at the same time at right angles to each other. Their speeds are 54 km/h and 72 km/h, respectively. After 20 seconds, the distance between them will be :

X and Y are two stations which are 280 km apart. A train starts at a certain time from X and travels towards Y at 60 km/h. After 2 hours, another train starts from Y and travels towards X at 20 km/h. After how many hours does the train leaving from X meets the train which left from Y ?

A person travels a distance of 240 km, partly by train and the rest by bus. He 1 takes 3 hours if he travels 150 km by 2 train and the rest by bus. If he travels 140 km by bus and the rest by train, he takes 2 3 hours. What is the speed of the train 3 (in km/h) ?

Renu was sitting inside train A, which was travelling at 50 km/h. Another train, B, whose length was three times the length of A crossed her in the opposite direction in 15 seconds. If the speed of train B was 58 km/h, then the length of train A (in m) is :

A train runs 50% faster than a car. Both start running from the same point and meet after covering a distance of 360 km. In the middle of this journey, the train stops for two hours due to some faults in the engine. What is the speed of the train ? (in km/h)

A train goes from P to Q with a speed km/h, then from Q to R (QR = µ 2PQ) with a speed 3 km/h, and returns µ µ from R to P with a speed km/h. What 2 is the average speed (in km/h) of the train for the entire journey starting from P and back to P?

The platform of a station 400 m long starts exactly where the last span of a bridge 1.2 km long ends. How long(in min.) will a train 200 m long and travelling at the speed of 72 km/h take to cover the distance between the starting point of the span of the bridge and the far end of the platform?
A 360 m long running at a uniform speed, crosses a platform in 55 seconds and a man standing on the platform in 24 seconds. What is the length (in metres) of the platform?
Amit travelled from A to B at an average speed of 80 km/h. He travelled the first 75% of the distance in two-third of the time and the rest at a constant speed of x km/h. The value of x is:
A man travels a certain distance at 12km/h and returns to the starting point at 9km/h. The total time taken by him for 1 the entire journey is 2 hours. The total 3 distance (In km) covered by him is:
The speed of train A is 25 km/h more than the speed of train B. A takes 4 hours less time to travel a distance of 300 km than what train B takes to travel 250 km. What is the speed (In km/h) of A?

A and B are travelling towards each other from the points P and Q respectively. After crossing each other A and B take 6 1 hours and 8 hours, respectively, to 8 reach their destinations Q and P, respectively. If the speed of B is 16.8 km/h then the speed ( in km/h) of A is:
A takes 30 minutes more than B to cover a distance of 15 km at a certain speed. But if A doubles his speed, he takes one hour less than B to cover the same distance. What is the speed (in km/h) of B?
The speed of a car increases by 2 km/h after every one hour. If the distance travelled in the first one hour was 35 km, what was the total distance travelled in 12 hours?

Two cars, X and Y, start from points 320 km apart and travel at constant speeds. If they move towards each other, they meet in 8 hours. If they move in the same direction, they meet in 16 hours. What is the speed of car X? (Assume X is the faster car).

A car starts from point P on a circular track and an SUV starts from point Q, which is 800 meters ahead of P in the direction of motion. The car's speed is 20m/s, and the SUV's speed is 15 m/s. The circumference of the track is 1.5 km. How much distance will the car have traveled when it first overtakes the SUV ?
A car travels 0.687 km in 1 minute. How far does it travel in 1 hour 45 minutes ?
A car covers 50% of a certain distance at a pace of 40 km/h and the remaining distance at a pace of 60 km/h. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey ?

Aditya and Harish are jogging around a park's circular track which has a perimeter of 1.2 km. They start from the same point at 6:00 a.m. and run in opposite directions. Aditya's speed is 5 km/h, and Harish's speed is 7 km/h. At what time will they meet for the fifth time?
An airplane travels a specific distance at a speed of 250 km/h over the course of 4 hours. To cover the same distance in just 1 hour, it needs to fly at a speed of:
A man travels from Delhi to Noida. If he travels at 60 km/h, he arrives 1 hour early. If he travels at 40 km/h, he arrives 1 hour late. What is the distance (in km) between Delhi and Noida?

A cyclist travels from City A to City B at an average speed of 40 km/h and takes 8 hours. If they want to complete the same journey in 5 hours, by what amount (in km/h) should they increase their average speed ?

A train leaves Station P at 5:00 AM and travels towards Station Q at a constant speed of 60 km/h. Another train leaves Station Q at 7:00 AM and travels towards Station P at a constant speed of 90 km/h. The distance between the two stations is 540 km. At what time will the two trains meet ?
A cyclist has to cover 160 km. After cycling for 9 hours and 36 minutes, 3 he finds that he has completed th of 4 the total distance. What is his speed in km/h ?

A delivery van travels at a constant speed of 84 km/h to cover a certain route in 1 hour and 45 minutes. If traffic increases the time taken by 15 minutes, by what percentage must the van's average speed decrease to complete the route ?

A student walks from his home to school at a speed of 6 km/h and reaches 15 minutes late. If he increases his speed to 8 km/h, he reaches 5 minutes early. What is the distance (in km) from his home to school ?
The ratio of the speeds of a car and a bus is 3 : 4. If the bus covers a distance of 480 km in 6 hours, what is the speed of the car in km/h?

A thief and a police officer are 800 meters apart. If they run in the same direction, the police officer catches the thief in 16 minutes. If they run towards each other, they meet in 4 minutes. What is the speed of the thief in meters per minute ?
A car runs 27.6 km using 3.75 liters of petrol. What is the mileage in km per liter (rounded to 2 decimals) ?

The speeds of two motorcyclists are in the ratio 4 : 3. If the slower motorcyclist has a 27 km head start, and his speed is 18 km/h, how far (in km) will the faster motorcyclist travel to overtake him?
Naveen covers half of his journey at 18 km/h and the remaining half at 9 km/h. His average speed is:
A Bus travels 11.9 km using 1.4 liters of fuel. How many kilometers does it travel per liter ?
A train covered a certain distance in 3 parts with average speeds of 12 km/h, 15 km/h, and 30 km/h. What is his average speed over the entire journey, assuming equal distances ?
The speed of a car is 90 kmph. Find the distance covered by the car in 80 seconds.
An athlete runs a 350-meter race in 20 seconds. How much is his speed in km/h ?
A runner completes 5.2 km in 38 minutes. What is his speed in km/h ?
Manoj crosses a 800 m long street in 8 minutes. What is his speed in km per hour ?
Sanjay and Vijay start from the same point and walk at 6 km/h and 3 km/h respectively, in the same direction. What will be the distance between them after 2 hours?
A cyclist covers a distance of 450 meters in 25 seconds. What is his speed in km/h ?
Amit walks at 10 km/h for 12 km and 12 km/h for 16 km. What is his average speed?
Riya crosses a road 150 metres wide in 75 seconds. Her speed in km/hr is:
A man reduces his speed from 16 kmph to 14 kmph. So, he takes 6 minutes more than the normal time. What is the distance travelled by him?
A train starts from a place Mumbai at 6 a.m. and arrives at Kolhapur at 2:30 p.m. on the same day. If the speed of the train is 120 km per hour, find the distance traveled by the train.
Rajesh covers one-third of his journey at a speed of 10 km/h, the next one-third at 20 km/h, and the remaining part at 60 km/h. What is his average speed ?

Aarav travels from his home to the library at a speed of 4.5 km/h and returns at a speed of 3 km/h. If the total journey time is 5 hours and 6 minutes, what is the distance between his home and the library ?
A train covers 360 km in 4 hours. What is its average speed in meters per second?
A car travelling at a speed of 45 km/hour can complete a journey in 9 hours. How long will it take to travel the same distance at 27 km/hour?
The time taken to cover 150 km by car is 2 hours. Find the time taken to cover 175 km by car.
Aman and Ashish travel the same distance at speeds of 15 km/hr and 18 km/hr respectively. If Aman takes 30 minutes more than Ashish, the distance traveled by each is:
A person crosses a 600 m long street in 8 minutes. What is his speed in km/h?
Anshu travelled a certain distance by bike at the rate of 50 kmph. And walked back at the rate of 8 kmph. If the whole journey took 5 hours 48 minutes, what was the distance ?
A train covers 3 equal distances at speeds in the ratio 2 : 3 : 5 . What is the ratio of the average speed over the entire journey to the lowest speed ?
A car travels the first 200 km at 50 km/h and the next 200 km at 25 km/h. What is the average speed for the total journey ?
Suraj travels at a speed of 90 kmph. Find the distance covered by him in 22 seconds.
A car covers three equal distances at speeds of 60 km/h, 90 km/h, and 180 km/h, respectively. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey ?
Deepak covers half of his journey at 27 km/h and the remaining half at 9 km/h. His average speed is:
The speed of a car is 126 kmph. Find the distance covered by the car in 60 seconds.
A diver was swimming at a depth of -45 meters below sea level. She then ascended 20 meters towards the surface, What is her new position relative to sea level?
A car travels 160 km in 4 hours. What is its speed?
A car takes 8 hours to cover a distance of 480 km. If its speed is increased by 20 km/h, how much time will it take?

A train moves from City A to City B, a distance of 240 Kilometres in 4 hours. If the train keeps running at the same constant rate, how many hours will it take to travel the distance between City C and City D, which are 600 Kilometres apart?
A train covers 200 km in 4 hours. How long will it take to cover 350 km at the same speed?
A train running at 54km/h crosses a platform in 30 seconds. If the platform is 250 m long, what is the length of the train?
In 5 hours, a car completes a journey of 300 km. If its speed is increased by 20 %, how much time will it take to cover 432 km?
A car travels 150 km in 3 hours and returns in 2 hours. What is the average speed?

Two cyclists start simultaneously from points X and Y, which are 200 km apart, and head towards each other. They meet after 4 hours. If the speed of one cyclist is 35 km/h, what is the speed of the other cyclist?
A student rides to school at 30 km/h and reaches 20 minutes late. If he rides at 40 km/h, he reaches 10 minutes early. What is the distance to his school?
A vehicle covers 60 km with a speed of 30 km/h and then another 60 km with a speed of 70 km/h. What is the overall average speed of the vehicle?
A train 300 m long passes a pole in 15 seconds. What is its speed?
A train 300 meters long is traveling at a speed of 90 km/h. How long will it take to pass a platform 200 meters long?
A boy walks at 15 km/h for 2 hours and then jogs at 30 km/h for 3 hour. What is the average speed?
A man walks at 8 km/h. After 12 hours, he is overtaken by a cyclist who started 4 hours after him. What is the speed of the cyclist ?
A train 300 meters long passes a pole in 20 seconds. How long will it take to pass a platform 450 meters long?
The radius of a circular track is 140 meters. If a cyclist completes 4 rounds, what distance does the cyclist cover?
Two trains are moving in opposite directions at 40 km/h and 60 km/h. Their lengths are 0.2 km and 0.8 km respectively. In how much time will they cross each other?
A man covers a certain distance by bike in 6 hours. If he increases his speed by 10 km/h, he takes one hour less to cover the same distance. What is the original speed of the bike ?
A person takes 3 hours to travel a certain distance by cycle. Returning over the same distance, he increases his speed by 12 km/h and takes 2.5 hours. What was his original speed?
How much distance will be covered in 3 hours at a speed of 45 km/h?
Two cars start from the same point. One travels north at 30 km/h, the other travels east at 40 km/h. What is the distance between them after 3 hours?
A bus travels a distance of 100 km at a speed of 60 km/hr and returns the same distance at a speed of 40 km/hr. What is the average speed of the bus for the entire journey?
A car runs at a speed of 70 km/h. How much time will it take to cover a distance of 280 km?
Amit drives from P to Q at 80 km/h and returns at 60 km/h. If the total time taken is 7 hours, what is the distance between P and Q ?
A train travels at 90 km/h. What is its speed in meters per second?
Ravi man walks from P to Q at 6 km/h and returns from Q to P at 3 km/h. What is his average speed for the whole journey?
If a car travels 200 km in 4 hours, how much distance will it cover in 7 hours at the same speed ?
A train 180 meters long crosses another train of length 120 meters running in the opposite direction in 10 seconds. If the speed of the first train is 54 km/h, estimate the speed of the second train.
If a person walks at 10 km/h, he misses a train by 14 minutes. If he walks at 12 km/h, he reaches the station 10 minutes early. Find the distance to the station.
The time taken for a train to pass a pole is 15 seconds, while it takes 27 seconds to cross a bridge measuring 200 meters. Calculate the length of the train.
A car travels from A to B at 90 km/h and returns at 45 km/h. Find the approx. average speed of the car.
A train moving at a speed of 108 km/h crosses a bridge of length 300 meters in 40 seconds. What is the length of the train?
Two trains, each 900 meters long, are moving in opposite directions at speeds of 70 km/h and 50 km/h. How long will it take for the trains to completely pass each other ?

A car starts a 300 km journey with a full tank. For the first 120 km, it travels at 40 km/h. Due to fuel reduction, the speed drops by 10 km/h for the next 90 km. For the remaining journey, it further slows by 15 km/h. Estimate the average speed for the whole journey.
A bike rider travels 30 kilometers at a velocity of 8 km/h and then comes back along the same path at 10 km/h. What is the cyclist's average speed for the entire trip?
Two cars start simultaneously from the same point, one traveling east at 7.5 km/h and the other traveling north at 4 km/h. How far apart are they after 2 hours?

A large ship consumes 0.4 liters of fuel per km, and a smaller ship consumes 0.25 liters per km. If the large ship travels 600 km and the small ship travels 800 km, what is the total fuel cost at a rate of ₹130 per liter ?
A car covers three equal distances at speeds of 30km/h, 60km/h, and 90km/h, respectively. What is the approximate average speed of the car for the entire journey ?

A delivery boy started from his office at 10 a.m. to deliver an article. He rode his scooter at a speed of 32 km/h. He delivered the article and waited for 15 minutes to get the payment. After the payment was made, he reached his office at 11 : 25 a.m., travelling at a speed of 24 km/h. Find the total distance travelled by the boy.
A train crosses a 360-meter-long platform in 30 seconds and a man standing on the platform in 18 seconds. What is the length of the train ?

A train departs from Station A for Station B at 10:00 AM, traveling at a speed of 50 km/h. Another train departs from Station B for Station A at 12:00 PM traveling at a speed of 80 km/h. The distance between the two stations is 620 km. At what time will the two trains cross each other?

Cities P and Q are 300 km apart. Two trains start from P and Q simultaneously. If they proceed in the same direction, they will encounter each other in 30 hours. If they travel towards each other, they meet in 6 hours. What is the speed of the slower train ?

A thief saw a policeman, and he started running at a speed of 18 m/s. After 12 seconds, the policeman starts running behind the thief at a certain speed. If the policeman covered 864 meters distance to reach the thief, then the speed (in m/s) of the policeman is:
Two trains, 148 m and 152 m long, are running towards each other on parallel lines at 62 km/h and 46km/h, respectively. In what time will they be clear of each other from the moment they meet ?
A policeman follows a thief, who is 150 metres ahead of him., and they run at the speed of 6 km/h and 5 km/h, respectively. What distance does the policeman cover to catch up with the thief ?

A Policeman chases a thief. The speed of the policeman and thief are 10 kmph and 8 kmph, respectively. If the policeman started 15 minutes late, find the time taken by the policeman to catch the thief.

Two trains running towards each other on parallel tracks, at speeds of 45 km/hr and 51 km/hr, take 21 seconds to cross each other. If the length of one train is 290 m, then the length (in m) of the other train is :

A train travelling at a speed of 60 km/h leaves station A at 7 : 00 a.m. and another train travelling at a speed of 84 km/h starts from station A at 9 : 30 a.m. in the same direction on a parallel track. At what distance (in km) from station A and after how many hours of travel of the second train will they be together ? Express your answer in the same order.

A person has to cover a distance of 8 km in 1 hour. If he covers one-fourth of the distance in one-third of the total time, then what should his speed (in km/h) be to cover the remaining distance in the remaining time so that the person reaches the destination exactly on time ?

A thief saw a policeman and he started running at a speed of 12 m/s. After a certain time, the policeman starts running behind the thief at a speed of 18 m/s. If the policeman covered a 540 m distance to catch the thief, the time (in seconds) after which the policeman started running is:

A fast train takes 1 hour less than a slow train for a journey of 96 km. If the speed of the slow train is 8 km/h less than that of the fast train, then find the speeds of the fast train and slow train respectively.

Radha walks to her office 5 km away from home. In the morning, she covers the distance in 1 hour whereas, while returning home in the evening, she takes 15 more minutes to cover the same distance. Find her average speed (in km/h) during the two-way journey.
